What We Do

Two Divisions.
One Mission.

LeoLink combines deep operational expertise with homegrown technology — no third-party black boxes, no vendor lock-in. We build what we need, when we need it.

📋

Business Operations

Notary services, virtual assistance, business consulting, grant administration, licensing support, and procurement — the operational backbone your organization needs.


View Services →
🧠

Technology Platform

Proprietary LMS, intranet with ticketing, HR integration, and a mental health care app in development — built from scratch for behavioral health and compliance-driven environments.


Explore Platform →
🏥

Industry Expertise

Specialized knowledge in behavioral health, healthcare, nonprofits, government contracting, social services, and education — we understand your regulatory landscape.


See Industries →
Our Platform

Software We Own.
Not Software We Rent.

Every platform tool LeoLink deploys was built internally. That means no per-seat licensing surprises, no third-party API dependency, and full control over your data.

Live

Learning Management System

Custom LMS for staff training and compliance tracking. Manage onboarding, continuing education, and certification requirements in one place.

Live

Intranet + Ticketing System

Internal communications hub with a built-in support ticketing system. Streamline operations and keep teams connected without third-party tools.

In Development

Mental Health Care App

A native application purpose-built for behavioral health providers — scheduling, documentation, progress tracking, and client engagement tools.
